spec_match.rationale: Accurately verifies standard cookie permissions, document.cookie state, and the three SAA methods.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Auto-probes on load, offers button controllers to run manual diagnostics or clear logs, and outputs status strings into detailed logging terminal windows in green, yellow, and red.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligned with parent description: checks all 3 SAA methods, reports presence, and prints diagnostic details in the log console.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely protects the API checks with try-catch validation blocks and includes clear warning labels explaining top-level execution limits.

references.rationale: Contains direct reference links to ChromeStatus database entries.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful design styling. Employs standard spacing, custom console code Snippets, card dividers, and breadcrumbs.

summary: An outstanding interactive testing sandbox. By automatically executing capability audits upon load, utilizing a dual-terminal reporting console to print verbose diagnostic logs, and fully explaining modern cross-site iframe storage behaviors, it satisfies all repository rules perfectly.
